item.title: When you are built and predicated upon extreme force that will come back even in casual society, and going on really dating apps...
item.description:
When you are built and predicated upon extreme force that will come back even in casual society, and going on really dating apps is incredibly showing of this that they are not even ashamed - me saying this was investigative journalism was a joke by the way, it’s not it is just good fun though

item.title: There is a long history of this and this is not surprising in fact what is surprising is that this came to light at all
item.description:
There is a long history of this and this is not surprising in fact what is surprising is that this came to light at all. The source for this is democracy now.
